comments.text: This hits Home . Was engaged and 2 months away from the wedding , Found out I was getting cheated on so I left and went back home ( 2,000 miles away ) , Started my own business , Reconnected with my highschool sweetheart and now I’m worth 7 figures , My first baby will be born Oct 30 and I own everything I have , I truly have been better since she’s been gone 💪
comments.author: @Jayvonn07

comments.text:
She walked away unphased, no cuts, no injuries.. but morgan is all beat up and injured..
. Man that hits hard... i see what you did here Morgan . (The relationship ended)
comments.author: @isaacrivera4618

comments.text: Relationship was a car crash, she came out unharmed and just walked away, Morgan was badly damaged and wounded from the relationship, took him a while to walk away slowly from what had happened, but as he took the time his wounds healed without scars. Powerful statement this video.
comments.author: @Byrni1111

comments.text: I know this song is about a woman but being 8 years sober now. I think about all the time I was lost in the bottle. Great song and killer album!
comments.author: @timisin1238

comments.text: She leaves without a scratch while he's banged up and his poor truck is totaled. Very poetic.
comments.author: @ErinCostello-v8b
